turns.user_message: I feel heavy and slow all the time, like my body is made of lead. Everything just feels kind of dull and muted.
This heavy feeling just won't go away, and it's making everything seem pointless. I don't even get excited about things I know I should like.
I'm so tired of feeling this heavy and empty, and I'm starting to think I should talk to someone. Nothing I do seems to shake this constant flatness.

generation_metadata.diversity_anchor: The speaker opens by describing a physical feeling.
